landing.text:
Secure, customizable & reliable WebRTC Video Calls| Whereby
Products
Pricing
Developers
Resources
Log in
Sign up
Secure video calls. Zero hassle
European owned and privacy-first by design, Whereby delivers reliable, user-friendly video calling for individuals, teams and enterprise platforms.
Get started
Trusted by leading companies like
Video calls for every use case
Product select
meetings
For individuals and teams
Instant video calls
Permanent room links
Essential features
Basic customization
Explore Meetings
<> embedded
For product builders
API integration & SDK tooling
Programmatic room creation
Extensive features
Advanced customization
Explore Embedded
"Seeing 90% of our video calls rated 4 or 5 stars for quality shows us how Whereby has proven to be a dependable part of the telehealth experience for our customers and the people they serve"
Katrina Baxter-Moore
Senior Product Manager
Whereby for
Telehealth
Connecting practitioners & patients anywhere, anytime.
Learn more
Whereby for
eLearning
Engaging virtual classroom experiences for teachers, coaches and their students.
Learn more
Why  Whereby?
Private & secure
Privacy, confidentiality and security are very important to us. Built in Europe, our products are GDPR and HIPAA compliant, and ISO 27001 certified.
Reliable & scalable
Our infrastructure is scalable and offers a consistently high quality video call experience, including in low bandwidth scenarios and on mobile devices.
Unrivaled support
From our developer docs to our dedicated Success team, we’re here to help. At no extra cost.
User-friendly
Our UI is built with human experience in mind to reduce tech fatigue and increase engagement through intuitive design and straight-forward usability.
Powerful features ready to go
Screen sharing
File sharing
Chat
Transcriptions
Virtual whiteboard
Custom branding
Explore features
Explore our customer stories

Comprehensive Comparison of Zoom Alternatives Jitsi Meet and Whereby
Whereby Statistics Improves Your Dart Game
Whereby launches new Hybrid Meetings feature
Secure, Customizable and Reliable WebRTC Video Calls| Whereby
Whereby: Secure video calls. Zero hassle

analysis.name: Whereby
analysis.value_proposition: European-owned, privacy-first WebRTC video calling for individuals, teams, and product builders needing embeddable or standalone video.
analysis.ideal_customer: Product builders embedding video into apps (telehealth, eLearning) and small-to-mid teams wanting no-install browser-based video meetings

features.name: permanent room links
features.description: Persistent URLs that always open the same meeting room — no scheduling required

features.name: instant video calls
features.description: Join or start a call immediately from a browser with no download

features.name: screen sharing
features.description: Share your screen during video calls

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Share files within a meeting room

features.name: chat
features.description: In-meeting text chat between participants

features.name: transcriptions
features.description: Automatic transcription of meeting audio

features.name: virtual whiteboard
features.description: Collaborative whiteboard within a meeting room

features.name: custom branding
features.description: Customize room appearance with logos, colors, and branding elements

features.name: recording
features.description: Record meeting sessions for later playback

features.name: live captions
features.description: Real-time auto-generated captions during video calls

features.name: live streaming via rtmp
features.description: Stream meetings live to external platforms via RTMP protocol

features.name: breakout groups
features.description: Split participants into separate sub-rooms during a meeting

features.name: dial-in
features.description: Join meetings via PSTN phone dial-in

features.name: waiting rooms
features.description: Hold participants in a waiting area before host admits them

features.name: user roles and meeting permissions
features.description: Control what participants can do via configurable roles and permissions

features.name: quality insights
features.description: Analytics dashboard for monitoring call quality metrics

features.name: assistants
features.description: AI or automated assistant capabilities within meetings

features.name: camera effects
features.description: Background blur, virtual backgrounds, and other camera filter effects

features.name: global room customizations
features.description: Account-wide settings that apply default configuration across all rooms

features.name: rest api
features.description: HTTP API for programmatic room creation and management

features.name: web component / pre-built ui
features.description: Drop-in embeddable video component for web apps requiring no custom UI work

features.name: react sdk
features.description: React-based Browser SDK for custom video UI built in React

features.name: ios sdk
features.description: Native iOS SDK for embedding video calls in iPhone/iPad apps

features.name: android sdk
features.description: Native Android SDK for embedding video calls in Android apps

features.name: react native sdk
features.description: Cross-platform React Native integration for mobile video

features.name: flutter sdk
features.description: Flutter integration for embedding video in Flutter mobile apps

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Event-based webhooks for tracking meeting lifecycle events

features.name: programmatic room creation
features.description: Create and manage meeting rooms dynamically via API

features.name: usage tracking
features.description: Track and monitor customer usage across embedded video sessions

features.name: secure s3 storage authentication
features.description: Secure authentication flow for storing recordings/files in customer-owned S3 buckets

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-compliant configuration for healthcare and telehealth use cases

features.name: gdpr compliance
features.description: European-built, GDPR-compliant data handling by default
features.evidence_quote: our products are GDPR and HIPAA compliant, and ISO 27001 certified

features.name: iso 27001 certification
features.description: Information security management certification

features.name: hybrid meetings
features.description: Support for hybrid in-person and remote meeting scenarios
features.evidence_quote: Whereby launches new Hybrid Meetings feature

features.name: low bandwidth support
features.description: Optimized performance on poor or limited network connections
features.evidence_quote: consistently high quality video call experience, including in low bandwidth scenarios

features.name: mobile support
features.description: Full video call functionality on mobile devices via browser or native SDK
features.evidence_quote: consistently high quality video call experience...on mobile devices

features.name: assistant sdk
features.description: SDK for building automated assistants that participate in or moderate meetings

features.name: core sdk
features.description: Low-level SDK for fully custom video call implementations

features.name: next.js integration
features.description: Documented integration pattern for embedding Whereby in Next.js apps

features.name: telehealth industry solution
features.description: Pre-built patterns and compliance guides for telehealth app builders

differentiators: European owned and privacy-first by design
GDPR, HIPAA, and ISO 27001 compliant out of the box
Permanent room links with no scheduling friction
Dual product: standalone Meetings AND embeddable API/SDK
Telehealth-specific implementation guides and HIPAA setup
Figma Video Call UI Kit for designers

recent_ships.source: Whereby launches new Hybrid Meetings feature (HN post)

praised: 90% of video calls rated 4 or 5 stars for quality (telehealth customer quote)
'dependable part of the telehealth experience' — Katrina Baxter-Moore, Senior PM

free_tier.limits: not specified in scraped content; FAQ confirms free plan exists

tiers.name: Meetings
tiers.headline_inclusions: Per user license; instant calls, permanent rooms, basic customization (detail not scraped)

tiers.name: Embedded
tiers.headline_inclusions: Charged by usage; API/SDK, programmatic room creation, extensive features (detail not scraped)

pricing.notes: Two distinct products with different billing models: Meetings is per-user-license, Embedded is usage-based. Specific tier prices were not available in scraped pricing page content. Free plan confirmed to exist via FAQ. Meetings API access requires Embedded plan.
